message:
test(safety): add memory safety regression tests

Comprehensive regression test suite covering:
- Buffer index overflow protection (OptimizedBuffer, PixelBuffer,
  GrayscaleBuffer, HitGrid)
- GraphemeId width saturation (128 -> 127, 255 -> 127)
- GraphemePool capacity tracking and slot reuse
- Combined safety invariants for data preservation

19 tests ensure overflow fixes cannot regress.

Closes bd-zqa3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
